mysite
Table of Contents

Class PermisosService

Namespace
Service.Logic
Assembly
Service.dll

Manages the permission tree: creation and modification of Familia groups, and provisioning of Patente leaf nodes from PermisoKeys.

public class PermisosService

object

Constructors

PermisosService()

Initializes a new instance with default SQL repositories.

public PermisosService()

Methods

CrearFamilia(Familia)

Persists a new Familia.

public void CrearFamilia(Familia familia)

Parameters

familia Familia

The family to create.

EliminarFamilia(Guid)

Deletes a Familia by its identifier.

public void EliminarFamilia(Guid id)

Parameters

id Guid

The unique identifier of the family to delete.

EnsurePermissions()

Ensures all constants declared in PermisoKeys exist as Patente records in the database, and that the "Administrador" family holds all of them.

public void EnsurePermissions()

Remarks

Intended to run on application startup. Uses reflection to enumerate PermisoKeys string constants and inserts any that are missing. The Administrador family is created if it does not exist.

GetAllFamilias()

Returns all Familia records, each fully hydrated via GetById (recursive children loaded).

public List<Familia> GetAllFamilias()

Returns

List<Familia>

List of fully-loaded families.

GetAllPatentes()

Returns all Patente records (flat list, no hydration needed).

public List<Patente> GetAllPatentes()

Returns

List<Patente>

GuardarFamilia(Familia)

Persists changes to a Familia after validating that the update would not introduce a cycle in the permission tree.

public void GuardarFamilia(Familia familia)

Parameters

familia Familia

The family to save. Must have been loaded via GetById (full recursive load).

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when a circular reference is detected.
